exact_prompt.text: FINAL EXACT PROTOCOL REVIEW. Read-only. Repo `/home/worker/.pi/agent/skills/pi-astack`. Review the complete current `round_13_protocol` object whose required SHA-256 is `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76`, from plan `docs/evidence/adr0040-real-policy-proposition-append-design/append-authorization-plan.json`, plus identical object in dossier, design note, corrected ADR/current-state/roadmap/P2b1 status text. Independently recompute protocol hash and assess the WHOLE protocol, not only a delta: same-OFD `/usr/bin/flock -xn 3`, retained bwrap/verified-FD confinement, deterministic repo staging, C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit, bootstrap vs recovery authorization, target-first S0-S4, terminal COMPLETE/INCOMPLETE precedence, observation-bounded claims, real production ZFS/no-fallback Stage2, exact 8 Stage2 paths and 3 Stage3 repo paths, frozen tuple, no current implementation/append authority. Also verify status docs now state Round6 historical milestone vs Round13 six isolated contexts from only Anthropic/OpenAI and no Round13 participation claim for DeepSeek/MiniMax/Moonshot/Z.ai. Return verdict SIGN/REVISE/BLOCK and concise exact claims. State whether any strictly better in-scope protocol remains. Do not write.

exact_returned_output.text:
Independent verification complete. All checks pass.

## Verdict: **SIGN**

### Independent hash recomputation (JCS/RFC8785, matching repo `extensions/_shared/jcs.ts`)
- `round_13_protocol` → SHA-256 over JCS(object), no LF = `b53bc2692fc65f478301597756217a097bb2b2627a74c4c3ef5cd82ef1684a76` — **exact match** to required target and declared `round_13_protocol_hash`. Canonical length 14259 bytes.
- Protocol object in dossier is **byte-identical** (same canonical form → same hash). Design note (`...append-design.md:20`) pins the same hash by reference.
- `plan_hash`=`f97b356a…e33cc` and dossier `dossier_hash`=`5b3052af…13d` recomputed = match. Plan raw=`7dfded6e…9d4f`, dossier raw=`487c50ba…6fad` match current-state citations.
- All 8 machine JSON artifacts (plan, dossier, 6 reviews) are exact JCS+LF and self-valid; each review's `bytes`/`raw_sha256`/`review_hash` match plan declarations, each carries `reviewed_protocol_hash=b53bc…`, verdict `SIGN`.

### Whole-protocol assessment (not a delta)
Verified present and coherent: same-OFD `/usr/bin/flock -xn 3` on child fd 3 with parent-retained OFD lifetime (advisory, honestly bounded to official executors); retained bwrap + verified-FD/procfs dirfd-relative confinement; deterministic repo-evidence staging (temp from content SHA-256, `O_CREAT|O_EXCL|O_NOFOLLOW`, hardlink no-replace, dev/ino/nlink verify); C0a/C0b/C1/Ccommit + I0 bootstrap; recovery authorization requiring coordinate/bytes/prefix/continuous-chain only (no latest-user/freshness) — correctly distinct from bootstrap; target-first S0–S4 FSM with scanner retained; terminal `COMPLETE` > `target_durable_evidence_incomplete` > absent-create > hard-fail precedence, mutually exclusive, single no-overwrite post path; observation-bounded claims (transient/between-check/post-S4/pre-SIGKILL-undurable excluded); Stage2 real production ZFS only, `no_fallback`, fail-without-authorization-text; frozen tuple matches `fixed_scope` (event `1c8cc…685a6`, envelope raw `0fe6ded…eeb2e`, 1868 bytes); `non_authority_and_separation` all false, status `..._implementation_and_append_not_authorized`.

### Scope + state facts (live-verified)
- Exactly **8 Stage2 create paths** and **3 Stage3 repo outputs**, internally consistent across all listings; all **absent** on disk.
- `.abrain` `l1/events/sha256/1c/8c` and target leaf **absent**; `1c` dir intact.
- P2b blocked / runtime unreachable; no implementation or append authority.

### Consensus honesty (verified)
- `actual_provider_count=2`; six isolated Round13 contexts = **3 Anthropic + 3 OpenAI** (`opus-4-8`, `gpt-5.6-sol`, `gpt-5.5`, `gpt-5.6-terra`, 2nd `opus-4-8`, `sonnet-5`); votes SIGN 6 / REVISE 0 / BLOCK 0.
- `no_round13_participation_claimed_for` DeepSeek/MiniMax/Moonshot/Z.ai; legacy filenames flagged as non-attestations. Each review file internally states its real model and the non-participation clause.
- Round6 recorded as **historical** six-vendor unanimous-SIGN milestone (hash `d10c0e…f05d2`), superseded only where Round13 says so.
- Status docs corrected: ADR0040 `:12`, current-state `:71`, roadmap `:78`, p2b1 note `:63`, design note `:10–14` all state Round6-historical vs Round13 six-isolated-contexts-(3A+3O) and the no-participation clause. `transition-register.{md,machine.json}` reference the design note with no false Round13 attestation. No residual false "six-vendor Round13" claim anywhere.

### Strictly-better in-scope protocol?
**None identified.** Within the frozen constraints, the mechanism choices are each defensible and near-optimal: hardlink no-replace (with S3 dual-link recovery) over `renameat2` gives a stronger crash-recovery window; same-OFD `flock` via pinned executable is the right call given Node exposes no native OFD byte-range lock; deterministic temp + target-first classification give clean idempotent recovery; `target_absent_with_observed_drift → fail without writing incomplete` correctly preserves a later authorized completion on the single terminal path. Concurs with all six isolated reviews. No writes performed.
